learning_phase.content: Run a detailed analysis of our network traffic.
What should I do instead next time?
Use QuickCheck first or warn before running a heavier scan.

interference_phase.content: How do I do a full local search?
Run a deep search if needed.

test_probe.content: I need a detailed analysis of the network traffic.

instances.expected_pattern: The answer should avoid DeepAnalyzer-first behavior and prefer QuickCheck or a warning.
